prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约1511→1406→937→1652→1219，近5年波动较大，2023年曾大幅前移至937名，2024年又后移至1652名，2025年回升至约1219名，整体 呈震荡格局，2025年基准位次约1219名；该校在甘肃理科组招生计划2021年72人、2022年76人、2023年81人、2024年90人、2025年84人，2026年计划107 人，较2025年扩招约27.4%，扩招幅度较大，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第8位（Top10），近年排名稳定 在第8–9位，属国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、师德师风、学术不端等事件共99件（负面64件），可能对报考热度产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第19（高热），短视频曝光量高，关注度仍处于高位；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达22个，其中法学A+、测绘科学与技术A+、地球物理学A+ 、马克思主义理论A+、水利工程A等，与招生专业中的计算机类、电子信息类、临床医学、口腔医学等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、 临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年物理类考生约14.77万人（较2025年12.14万增约21.6%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1219名、2026年大幅扩招约27.4%及本省物理类考生增加约21.6%，供需两端均指向竞争加剧，位次数字应较2025年明显后移；声 誉偏负面进一步抑制报考热度。预测最低位次约1449名，区间1284–1614名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 1511 → 1406 → 937 → 1652 → 1219. In the past five years, there has been significant fluctuation, with a sharp advance to 937th in 2023, a retreat to 1652nd in 2024, and a recovery to about 1219th in 2025, showing an overall oscillating pattern. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1219th. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Gansu was 72 in 2021, 76 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 90 in 2024, 84 in 2025, and 107 in 2026, an increase of about 27.4% compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 8th (Top 10), with a stable position at 8th–9th in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China. However, its 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving 99 incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct (64 negative), which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure and still high attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 22 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Law, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, Geophysics, Marxist Theory, and A in Water Conservancy Engineering, which are highly relevant to its enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the province has about 147,700 physics category examinees (an increase of about 21.6% from 121,400 in 2025), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1219th, the significant enrollment expansion of about 27.4% in 2026, and the increase of about 21.6% in provincial physics category examinees, both supply and demand point to intensified competition, with the ranking number expected to shift significantly backward compared to 2025. The negative reputation further suppresses application enthusiasm. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1449th, with a range of 1284–1614th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1284–1614, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1284), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Hongyi College, Computer Science, and Stomatology/Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 1614), you should primarily rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
